name: OCU P0 Foundation
description: Validates the foundation layer: probe, dispatcher, contracts, and Containers GPU extension.

metadata._llm_driven_reason: Vision-driven test suite per HelixQA Constitution §1 (Fully Autonomous LLM-Driven QA): prose actions are interpreted by the vision model. Article XI §11.5 exemption.
metadata.author: vasic-digital

test_cases.name: probe-local-populates-os-cpu-ram
test_cases.expected_result: ProbeLocal returns Report with non-empty OS, non-zero CPUCores and MemoryTotalMB

test_cases.name: probe-remote-thinker-nvidia

steps.name: Run ProbeRemote with fake NVIDIA output

test_cases.expected_result: ProbeRemote parses nvidia-smi CSV and returns 1 GPU device with vendor=nvidia

test_cases.name: dispatcher-picks-gpu-host
test_cases.expected_result: Dispatcher returns the host with a matching GPU when one is available

test_cases.name: dispatcher-no-gpu-host-errors

steps.name: Run Dispatcher resolve — no host available

test_cases.expected_result: Dispatcher returns a non-nil error when no host can satisfy the GPU requirement

test_cases.name: budget-assert-detects-regression
test_cases.expected_result: AssertWithin returns an error when the measured value exceeds the baseline by more than the gate

test_cases.name: containers-scheduler-gpu-canfit

steps.name: Run Scorer CanFit GPU happy path

test_cases.expected_result: Scorer reports CanFit=true when host VRAM meets or exceeds the request

test_cases.name: containers-scheduler-gpu-vendor-mismatch

steps.name: Run Scorer CanFit GPU vendor mismatch

test_cases.expected_result: Scorer reports CanFit=false when GPU vendor does not match the workload requirement

test_cases.name: containers-parser-nvidia-smi
test_cases.expected_result: ParseNvidiaSmi returns exactly one GPUDevice with correct fields from single-GPU CSV

test_cases.name: containers-backcompat-no-gpu
test_cases.expected_result: Workloads without GPU requirements pass through the scheduler unchanged

test_cases.name: probe-local-concurrent-race
test_cases.expected_result: Zero errors and zero data races across 100 concurrent ProbeLocal invocations
